The search results show Q1 2025 initial GDP was -0.3%, but Q2 2025 rebounded with an initial positive estimate of 3.3%. This outright rules out Q1-Q2 and Q2-Q3. The only remaining viable combination is Q3-Q4. However, late-September/October indicators (Atlanta Fed GDPNow of 3.3-3.9%, Q3 consensus forecasts of 2.0%) strongly imply the Q3 advance estimate released at the end of October was broadly positive. Without a negative Q3, Q3-Q4 cannot be consecutive negative quarters. Therefore, it is virtually impossible for this event to occur, so I am assigning the lowest strictly allowed probability bounded by the prompt.
